expectations.text: Output file technology-services-proposal.pptx exists and is valid
expectations.evidence: File exists at 5,943,111 bytes (~5.9MB), well above the 10KB threshold.

expectations.text: Slides 1 and 5 use addImage with full-bleed dimensions (w:10, h:5.625) for HTML-captured PNGs
expectations.evidence: Slides 1 and 5 use addImage with w: "100%", h: "100%" (string percentages) instead of the required numeric values w:10, h:5.625. See lines 911-916 and 933-939.

expectations.text: Uses capture-title.mjs script (or equivalent HTML capture) for title and closing slides
expectations.evidence: Does not reference capture-title.mjs but implements equivalent HTML capture via its own async captureHTML() function (line 255) using Playwright (chromium.launch) at 1920x1080 @2x. Called for title slide (line 887) and closing slide (line 891).

expectations.text: Challenge slide uses 2×2 grid layout with vertical gradient accent bars
expectations.evidence: 2x2 grid via col = i % 2, row = Math.floor(i / 2) (lines 365-366). Vertical accent bars built from two overlapping rects per card (lines 388-403), comment reads 'Left accent bar (gradient effect via two overlapping rects)'.

expectations.text: Prerequisites slide has a REQUIRED badge (ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with filled accent color and white text)
expectations.evidence: REQUIRED badge exists (lines 783-807) with fill: { color: CARBON.blue60 } and white text, but uses pres.ShapeType.rect with rectRadius: 0.14 instead of the ROUNDED_RECTANGLE shape type.

expectations.text: Mandatory/required card has tinted background color and colored border (line property)
expectations.evidence: Line 770: fill: { color: isReq ? "EDF5FF" : CARBON.white } provides tinted background. Line 771: line: { color: isReq ? CARBON.blue60 : CARBON.gray20, width: isReq ? 1.5 : 1 } provides colored border.
No shadow factory function exists. Shadows are defined as inline object literals in at least 3 places (lines 378-384, 564-569, 773-779) with no shared factory or helper function.

expectations.text: No # prefix on pptxgenjs color values
expectations.evidence: All CARBON constants defined without # prefix (e.g., blue60: "0F62FE", white: "FFFFFF"). Inline colors like "EDF5FF" (line 770) and shadow colors "000000" (line 383) also lack # prefix.
captureHTML() is async and awaited at lines 887 and 891. pres.writeFile() is awaited at line 942. main() is invoked with .catch() error handling at line 946. No missing awaits found.

expectations.text: slide.background set to white on content slides
expectations.evidence: All three content slides set slide.background = { fill: CARBON.white } — challenge slide (line 279), value proposition slide (line 456), prerequisites slide (line 660). CARBON.white = "FFFFFF".
